summary: Iteration 20 - P2 Features and Bug Fixes Testing Completed. All 6 features tested and verified: Task mark complete bug fix working (PUT /api/tasks/{id} with JSON body), Trainer can see Tasks in sidebar, Trainer Dashboard has Passed Students tab, Quiz Exams shows QR Code button with working dialog, Attendance Insights page works for Branch Admin showing trainer compliance data.

task_mark_complete_bug_fix.details: Task status update now uses PUT /api/tasks/{id} with JSON body {status: 'Completed'}. Toast shows 'Task status updated'. Task changes from Pending to Completed with Reopen button appearing.

trainer_tasks_sidebar.details: Trainer can see Tasks link in sidebar. Successfully navigates to /tasks page and sees assigned tasks.

trainer_passed_students_tab.details: Trainer Dashboard shows 'Passed Students' tab. Stats card shows '1 Passed Students'. Tab data-testid='passed-tab' is present.

quiz_qr_code.details: Quiz Exams page shows QR Code button for each quiz. Clicking opens dialog with QR code image, quiz URL, Download QR and Copy Link buttons.

qr_code_api.details: GET /api/quiz-exams/{id}/qr-code returns exam_name, quiz_url, and qr_code_base64 (PNG format).

attendance_insights_page.details: Branch Admin can access /attendance-insights page. Shows trainer compliance data - Test Trainer has 4.8% compliance, 40 missed days, 6 active batches.

attendance_insights_api.details: GET /api/attendance/insights/missed returns analysis_period, total_batches, total_trainers, trainer_insights[], missed_days_list[], and summary with total_missed_days and avg_compliance_rate.

attendance_insights_access_control.details: Trainer correctly denied access to attendance insights endpoint (returns 403 Forbidden).

context_for_next_testing_agent: P2 features fully tested and working. Task mark complete bug is fixed. Trainer password is 'test123' not 'password123'. All 6 new features verified: Task status update with JSON body, Trainer Tasks sidebar access, Passed Students tab, QR Code for quizzes, Attendance Insights page and API.

bug_fixed.issue: Task mark complete was using wrong API format (query params instead of JSON body)
bug_fixed.fix_verified: PUT /api/tasks/{id} with JSON body {status: 'Completed'} works correctly. UI shows toast 'Task status updated' and task status changes to Completed.
